name: Vanilla Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve gelatin in hot water.
2. Whisk the milk and almost cold gelatin together.
3. Add the vanilla extract and sugar sweetener.
4. Pour into freezing trays and freeze without stirring.
5. Serve with fruit.
Note: 1 serving contains: 60 calories; 5 grams (1/2 unit) carbohydrate; 4 grams protein; 3 grams fat.
